steps.action: Open Company Settings from the local app at /WEA/company/settings.
steps.expected: Company settings render with design-system styling and no hardcoded green/amber/red/shadow classes.
steps.observed: Company Settings rendered with JetBrains Mono styling; DOM audit found no rendered forbidden color/shadow classes.

steps.action: Open /instance/settings/general and inspect the rendered settings navigation.
steps.expected: Instance General settings use the same design-system styling.
steps.observed: General settings rendered correctly and exposed Experimental and Plugins links; DOM audit found no rendered forbidden classes.

steps.action: Open /instance/settings/experimental and /instance/settings/plugins from the instance settings area.
steps.expected: Experimental Settings and Plugin Manager also use the design system.
steps.observed: Experimental and Plugin Manager pages rendered with the same theme-aware styling; no rendered forbidden classes were found.

assertions.title: Projects pages use design system colors

steps.action: Open /WEA/projects and inspect the project list.
steps.expected: Projects list uses design-system colors and avoids hardcoded amber/red/shadow-lg classes.
steps.observed: Projects list rendered correctly; DOM audit found no rendered forbidden classes.

steps.action: Follow the actual Onboarding project link from the list page.
steps.expected: Project detail page renders with the same design-system styling.
steps.observed: Navigated to /WEA/projects/onboarding/issues and the project detail view rendered with no rendered forbidden classes.

evidence.network: Projects list rendered with links to /WEA/projects/onboarding and /WEA/projects/onboarding/issues; detail navigation completed through the in-app project link.

assertions.title: Import/Export pages use design system colors

steps.action: Follow the Export link from Company Settings.
steps.expected: Company Export page renders with design-system styling.
steps.observed: Navigation landed on /company/export and rendered the Not Found page instead of an export screen.

steps.action: Follow the Import link from Company Settings.
steps.expected: Company Import page renders with design-system styling.
steps.observed: Navigation landed on /company/import and rendered the Not Found page instead of an import screen.

evidence.network: In-app links from Company Settings navigated to /company/export and /company/import, both of which rendered Not Found.

assertions.issues: Export and Import links are present in Company Settings but currently route to Not Found pages, so the styled export/import surfaces could not be validated.

assertions.title: Standalone pages use design system basics

steps.expected: The standalone Not Found page uses design-system font and color variables and avoids rounded-lg/rounded-md source styling.
steps.observed: The app rendered the Not Found page with JetBrains Mono, theme variables (--bg #C4878E / --fg #FFFFFF), and no rendered rounded-lg/rounded-md/rounded-xl classes.

evidence.network: Opening /nonexistent-url resulted in the Not Found UI at /nonexistent-url/dashboard.

assertions.title: Dashboard agent navigation returns to themed dashboard

steps.action: Open /WEA/dashboard and switch the theme to violet-indigo using the sidebar theme control.
steps.expected: Dashboard theme changes to violet-indigo and remains active.
steps.observed: Dashboard stayed on /WEA/dashboard with data-theme=violet-indigo and --bg=#3A28B0.

steps.action: Click the Active Executive agent name from the dashboard.
steps.expected: Agent detail page opens and keeps the violet-indigo theme.
steps.observed: Navigated to /WEA/agents/active-executive/dashboard and the detail page still had data-theme=violet-indigo with --bg=#3A28B0.

steps.expected: Dashboard returns with the violet-indigo theme preserved.
steps.observed: Returned to /WEA/dashboard and the page still had data-theme=violet-indigo with --bg=#3A28B0.

evidence.network: Observed GET /api/companies/fe22e791-2c82-4f79-9e78-f2a908e8e272/dashboard during dashboard views and GET /api/agents/active-executive?companyId=fe22e791-2c82-4f79-9e78-f2a908e8e272 on agent detail.

frictions.description: The prompt-listed settings and import/export routes did not match the app's actual rendered links. Company Settings was reachable at /WEA/company/settings, instance settings at /instance/settings/*, and the Company Settings Export/Import links resolved to /company/export and /company/import.
frictions.resolution: Followed the actual in-app links where available and recorded the import/export destination mismatch as a failed assertion.

frictions.description: Opening /nonexistent-url redirected the browser URL to /nonexistent-url/dashboard before rendering the Not Found page.
frictions.resolution: Validated the rendered Not Found surface at the final URL and recorded the redirect behavior in the evidence.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed and 1 failed. The only failure was VAL-GUI-EXP-C4-003 because the Company Settings Export and Import links currently land on Not Found pages.
